response.justification: Wei Chen is a skilled full-stack engineer with strong fundamentals in distributed systems and software craftsmanship. However, the resume shows insufficient depth in critical requirements. The 8-year C++ minimum is notably unmet—only ~1 year of professional C++ experience from 2014-2015 is evident. Additionally, there is no demonstrated technical leadership role in cloud infrastructure or mentoring experience. The career trajectory suggests a generalist excelling as an individual contributor rather than a specialized cloud infrastructure technical leader.
strengths: Proven high-performance distributed systems expertise from Dunnhumby role (millions of requests/second, asynchronous I/O, caching, real-time databases)
Strong software engineering culture advocate—organized code dojos, created training courses, champions TDD and CI/CD practices
14+ years shipping products across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with consistent senior-level roles
concerns: Critical C++ gap: only ~1 year of professional C++ experience (2014-2015) versus the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of technical leadership role mentoring engineers or owning cloud infrastructure initiatives; primarily individual contributor background despite seniority titles
Limited production cloud compute platform experience—AWS CDK and Kubernetes exposure at Optilyz and side projects lack the strategic infrastructure platform focus required

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and high-performance infrastructure background
